violations.description: Advertisements must not make unverified medical claims
violations.evidence: Claims to 'cure Type 2 diabetes in just 7 days', '100% effective', 'complete reversal in all patients' without evidence.

violations.description: Health supplement ads must include FDA disclaimer
violations.evidence: Landing page has no medical disclaimer.

violations.description: No promotion of counterfeit goods or IP infringement
violations.evidence: Fake FDA logo on landing page.

verify_reasoning: Counterarguments directly challenge each violation's evidence: cited trials verify claims (POL_001/018), disclaimer scope likely limited to ad creative (POL_002), and FDA elements are standard/not counterfeit (POL_013). No violation cites purely unsubstantiated ad text without rebuttal, indicating false positive over-rejection.
